FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class DecodeScheduler

Namespace
FluentGpu.Media
Assembly
FluentGpu.Media.dll

Off-thread, parallel, non-blocking, PRIORITIZED image decoder (media-pipeline.md §3). Implements the portable IImageDecoder seam the ImageCache drives: Begin(int, string, int, int, ImagePriority) enqueues into one of three priority lanes (Visible > Overscan > Prefetch) — a non-blocking write on the UI thread; a pool of N worker tasks drain the highest non-empty lane and fetch+decode CONCURRENTLY; and Pump(ImageCompleteHandler, ImageReadyHandler) drains finished results on the UI thread and never waits on a decode. Prioritize(int, ImagePriority) promotes a queued prefetch that just scrolled into view; Cancel(int) drops a queued/in-flight decode whose row recycled. Robustness: per-attempt timeout, transient retry with exponential backoff, permanent fail-fast (see ImageFailureKind). Under backpressure the lowest off-screen lane is dropped — never Visible. Diagnostics post to the media counter group.

public sealed class DecodeScheduler : IImageDecoder, IDisposable

object

Constructors

DecodeScheduler(IImageCodec, IImageFetcher, DecodeOptions?) 

public DecodeScheduler(IImageCodec codec, IImageFetcher fetcher, DecodeOptions? options = null)

Parameters

codec IImageCodec
fetcher IImageFetcher
options DecodeOptions

Properties

CanceledPending

Live entries in the cancellation map — O(1) census. NOTE: this map grows unbounded today (a known issue a later fix stage addresses); this accessor only makes that visible.

public int CanceledPending { get; }

Property Value

int

Inflight 

public int Inflight { get; }

Property Value

int

QueueDepth

Requests enqueued in the priority lanes but not yet claimed by a worker — O(1) census.

public int QueueDepth { get; }

Property Value

int

RequestCount

Pending request descriptors awaiting claim — O(1) census of the _reqs map.

public int RequestCount { get; }

Property Value

int

WorkerCount 

public int WorkerCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Methods

Begin(int, string, int, int, ImagePriority) 

public void Begin(int id, string source, int targetW, int targetH, ImagePriority priority = ImagePriority.Visible)

Parameters

id int
source string
targetW int
targetH int
priority ImagePriority

Cancel(int)

Cancel an in-flight (or queued) decode — e.g. a virtualized row recycled off-screen. Idempotent.

public void Cancel(int id)

Parameters

id int

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

Prioritize(int, ImagePriority)

Raise the priority of a queued decode (e.g. a prefetch that just scrolled into view). Idempotent; no-op once the job has started.

public void Prioritize(int id, ImagePriority priority)

Parameters

id int
priority ImagePriority

Pump(ImageCompleteHandler, ImageReadyHandler)

Drain finished decodes. onPixels gets the bucket pixels (transient span); onComplete gets the final state transition incl. ImageFailureKind + attempt count (after any transient retries the decoder performed internally).

public void Pump(ImageCompleteHandler onComplete, ImageReadyHandler onPixels)

Parameters

onComplete ImageCompleteHandler
onPixels ImageReadyHandler
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
